PreToolUse.command: input=$(cat); echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys, json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); tool=data.get('toolName',''); inp=json.dumps(data.get('toolInput',{})); protected=['facilitator','notebooks']; blocked=any(p in inp for p in protected); exit(0) if not blocked else print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PreToolUse','permissionDecision':'deny','permissionDecisionReason':'Access to facilitator/ and notebooks/ is blocked — these folders contain trainer-only solutions and are excluded via .copilotignore.'}})) or exit(2)"
